description: Jellyfin is a free and open-source self-hosted media server system for organizing and streaming personal media collections to client apps. The jellyfin.org site provides documentation, downloads, and API reference for the server software and related clients.
summary: jellyfin.org documents one self-hosted HTTP API for Jellyfin servers, with published stable/unstable OpenAPI JSON documents and authentication via Jellyfin user/session auth or per-server API keys; no GraphQL, MCP server, or official CLI surface was found on jellyfin.org.
